content.full_text:
October 11, 1990

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Sir:

On September 14, 1990, I attended a FPPC workshop on the Campaign Disclosure Statements preparation. At the workshop either Linda Cassidy or Kevin Braaten-Moen made the statement that the only information required in section 1 of the Form 410 Statement of Organization is the name, address, telephone number of the Treasurer.

Today, I had the occasion to talk with Barbara Smith concerning the Form 410. Her opinion is that if the officers named in previously submitted Form 410 changed, we would be required to file a new Form 410 and provide the names of the new officers. I asked her if I could just submit a new Form 410 with just the Treasurer information in section 1 and she said no I would need to list all principal officers.

Please clarify for me whether Linda and Kevin or Barbara are correct.

Sincerely,

James Monighetti
Assistant Treasurer
AT&T Western Region PAC
ID # 841493
